overview.zh: 埃及地跨亚非两洲，主体位于非洲东北部，尼罗河纵贯全境，是世界上历史最悠久的文明发源地之一。以金字塔、狮身人面像等古代遗迹闻名，苏伊士运河是连接地中海与红海的重要国际航道。
overview.en: Egypt straddles northeastern Africa and Southwest Asia, with the Nile River running through the country; it is one of the world's oldest cradles of civilization. Famed for ancient monuments such as the pyramids and the Sphinx, it is also home to the Suez Canal, a vital waterway linking the Mediterranean and Red seas.

capitalHistory.zh: 首都开罗始建于公元969年法蒂玛王朝时期，长期作为伊斯兰世界的政治文化中心，被誉为'千塔之城'。
capitalHistory.en: The capital Cairo was founded in 969 CE under the Fatimid dynasty and long served as a political and cultural center of the Islamic world, earning the epithet 'city of a thousand minarets'.

climate.zh: 以热带沙漠气候为主，全年干燥少雨，夏季炎热、冬季温和，尼罗河沿岸与三角洲相对湿润。
climate.en: Mostly a hot desert climate that is dry year-round with hot summers and mild winters; the Nile valley and delta are relatively more humid.

note.zh: 歌词改编自赛义德·达尔维什的作品，1979年正式定为国歌。
note.en: Lyrics adapted from the work of Sayed Darwish; officially adopted as the national anthem in 1979.

name.en: Blue water lily (sacred lotus of ancient Egypt)

note.zh: 非洲传统劲旅，曾七次夺得非洲国家杯冠军。
note.en: A traditional African powerhouse, having won the Africa Cup of Nations a record seven times.

colorNotes.zh: 红、白、黑为国旗三色，象征革命、光明与历史；金色常与法老文明相关联。
colorNotes.en: The flag's red, white and black symbolize revolution, brightness and history; gold is often linked to pharaonic heritage.

colorNotes.zh: 绿色在伊斯兰文化中受尊崇，象征生命与信仰。
colorNotes.en: Green is revered in Islamic culture, symbolizing life and faith.

culturalTaboos.zh: 多数居民为穆斯林，禁猪肉、慎饮酒；进食、递物宜用右手。
culturalTaboos.en: Most residents are Muslim; pork is avoided and alcohol used sparingly; use the right hand for eating and passing items.

culturalTaboos.zh: 参观清真寺等宗教场所需着装端庄、脱鞋，尊重礼拜与斋月礼仪。
culturalTaboos.en: Dress modestly and remove shoes when visiting mosques; respect prayer times and Ramadan etiquette.

formatting.zh: 文字从右向左书写；界面与排版需整体镜像（RTL）。
formatting.en: Text is written right-to-left; UI and layouts should be fully mirrored (RTL).

formatting.zh: 书面语为标准阿拉伯语，日常口语为埃及阿拉伯方言，二者存在差异。
formatting.en: The written language is Modern Standard Arabic, while everyday speech uses Egyptian Arabic, which differs notably.

funFacts.zh: 吉萨大金字塔是古代世界七大奇迹中唯一留存至今的建筑。
funFacts.en: The Great Pyramid of Giza is the only one of the Seven Wonders of the Ancient World still standing.

funFacts.zh: 尼罗河全长约6650公里，是世界上最长的河流之一，孕育了古埃及文明。
funFacts.en: The Nile, about 6,650 km long, is one of the world's longest rivers and nurtured ancient Egyptian civilization.

label.zh: 联合国教科文组织世界遗产名录
